case_title: MARIELLA CASCO VS. 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASCO, MARIELLA AS TO DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CASCO, MARIELLA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-13-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASCO, MARIELLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF THE PREMISES AS A BASIS FOR LIABILITY, OR OTHER NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT. THE TESTIMONY CONCERNING A PROMISE TO PAY PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL EXPENSES CONTRADICTORY AND WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT TO COMPENSATE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,357.24 FILED BY CASCO, MARIELLA AS TO DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 24 HOUR FITNESS USA, INC.
